title: Lock v0.4 adoption roadmap
reason: Lock the next adoption-focused roadmap after v0.3.0 release binaries, curl installer verification, and model workspace pack work, while preserving factual install claims, planned Homebrew status, and the pre-runtime ni-kernel boundary.
proposed_changes: Add CAP-018 for the v0.4 adoption roadmap after v0.3.0 release binaries, curl installer, and model workspace pack work.

Record fresh-user install verification, Homebrew as Planned until tested, model workspace pack verification, README use-anywhere clarity, announcement kit, first qualitative benchmark case study, and optional lightweight static landing page as the adoption focus.
Add REQ-018, EVAL-022, RISK-015, DEC-014, NG-010, and adoption artifacts while preserving the pre-runtime ni-kernel boundary and prompt-only ni run behavior.
risk_impact: Adds a high-severity adoption roadmap risk so public distribution, promotion, model workspace, benchmark, and landing-page work cannot drift into false availability claims or kernel runtime execution.
readiness_impact: Expected to remain READY because CAP-018 is accepted with a linked requirement, evaluation, mitigated high-severity risk, artifacts, non-goals, and no blocker questions.
